title: make install.cni.sudo fails
body:
**Description**
The CNI git tree has no `build.sh` anymore so `make install.cni.sudo` fails.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1.  `make install.cni.sudo` 

**Workaround:**
1.  `sed -i -e 's/build\.sh/build_linux\.sh/' Makefile`
2. `make install.cni.sudo`

comments.body: Please open a PR to fix?
